---
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: default
    width: 1280
    height: 720
pagetitle: Chat Bubbles Example
echo: false
code-line-numbers: false
revealjs-plugins:
  - chat-bubbles
---

## Chat bubbles demo

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
Hey, are you coming tonight?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Yeah! What time does it start?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
Doors open at 7
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Perfect, see you there!
:::
:::

## Group chat demo

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
Alright who's bringing what to the potluck?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
I can do dessert 🎂
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-2}
I'll bring drinks
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-3}
Can I just bring chips
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
Jordan you always bring chips
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-3}
Chips are valid
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
He's not wrong
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-2}
Lol fine chips and dip at least
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left-3}
Deal
:::
:::

## Chat bubbles overflow demo

::: {.chat}
::: {.bubble-right}
Did you watch the game last night?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Of course! What a finish
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
I couldn't believe that last minute goal
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Neither could I, I literally jumped off the couch
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
Haha same. Are you going to the next one?
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Thinking about it. Tickets are expensive though
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-right}
I know a guy, I can get us a deal
:::

::: {.fragment .bubble-left}
Seriously?? Yes please
:::
:::
